import axios from"axios";const baseUrl="/api/blogs";let token=null;const setToken=newToken=>{token="Bearer ".concat(newToken);};const getAll=async()=>{const response=await axios.get(baseUrl);return response.data;};const create=async newObject=>{const config={headers:{Authorization:token}};const response=await axios.post(baseUrl,newObject,config);return response.data;};const likeBlog=async(id,blog)=>{const response=await axios.put("".concat(baseUrl,"/").concat(id),blog);return response.data;};const addComment=async(id,comment)=>{const response=await axios.post("".concat(baseUrl,"/").concat(id,"/comments"),{comment});return response.data;};const likeComment=async(blogId,commentId)=>{const response=await axios.put("".concat(baseUrl,"/").concat(blogId,"/comments/").concat(commentId,"/like"));return response.data;};const update=async(id,blog)=>{const config={headers:{Authorization:token}};const response=await axios.put("".concat(baseUrl,"/").concat(id),blog,config);return response.data;};const remove=async id=>{const config={headers:{Authorization:token}};const response=await axios.delete("".concat(baseUrl,"/").concat(id),config);return response.data;};// eslint-disable-next-line
export default{setToken,getAll,create,likeBlog,update,remove,addComment,likeComment};
